title: Finalist, Hollomon Health Innovation Challenge 2026 — Selected for developing Stezio, a smart digital stethoscope adapter for remote cardiovascular monitoring
3rd Winner, World Computer Hacker League 2025 - Regional Asia — Placed 3rd out of 11,774 global builders for creating hiplantify.com, a secured Web3 investment platform
Top 3, SelectUSA Tech 2025 (OpenTech Pitching), Maryland — Fixransomware.com secured 3rd place out of 48 global finalists
Winner, SelectUSA 2025 Indonesia — Won a pitching competition for Indonesian tech startups. Awarded the opportunity to attend the 2025 SelectUSA Summit in Maryland
1st Runner-Up, Meta APAC Accelerator Program — Meta's APAC Accelerator Initiative empowers startups with AI models, resources, and grants for innovative solutions in the region
LPDP Scholarship Awardee 2024 (Targeted Entrepreneurship) — Fully funded master's scholarship by the Indonesian Endowment Fund for Education covering tuition, living expenses, and research support
1st Runner Up, Social Impact Award - Venture Catalyst Challenge — Selected for competitive program at Imperial College London, demonstrating innovation and business acumen
1st Winner, LPDP Business Competition 2024 — Received a short course program at National University of Singapore
1st Runner Up, ASEAN Social Enterprise Development Programme — Programme supporting social enterprises in the ASEAN region with access to greater opportunities
YSEALI Academic Fellow Fall 2023 (Social Entrepreneurship) — University of Texas at Austin, focusing on leadership, cross-cultural exchange, and professional growth
Champion, Hackathon by East Ventures — Received $25,000 in funding (uncapped convertible notes). Founded Tulisno: a ChatGPT clone and transcription tools
1st Runner Up, DB-SNU Global Startup Competition — Supporting talented Asian college students aspiring to lead in business and technology
1st Winner, National Most Outstanding Student (PILMAPRESNAS) — Prestigious award by the Ministry of Education and Culture of Indonesia honoring top college students
Young Leader for Indonesia Wave 12 by McKinsey & Company — 6-month intensive leadership development program
Global Winner, Google DSC Solution Challenge 2020 — Annual competition inviting students to address local community challenges using Google technologies
Runner Up, Microsoft Imagine Cup Asia Regional 2020 — Presented the "Tulibot" smart glasses solution directly to Microsoft CEO, Satya Nadella
1st Winner, E2Festa 2019 - Songdo, Korea — International Engineering Education Festa Capstone Design Fair uniting young engineers globally
